data.title: BGL Advises ARX Wireless on the Sale of a Wireless Communications Tower Portfolio
data.description: A significant transaction involving the sale of a wireless communications tower portfolio has been completed in New York. Brown Gibbons Lang & Company (BGL), a prominent independent investment bank and financial advisory firm, recently facilitated the deal as the exclusive financial advisor to ARX Wireless. This transaction marks a notable milestone in the industry, with the specific details, including the financial figures and the number of towers involved, reflecting the robust nature of the deal. The involvement of BGL underscores its expertise and leadership in managing such complex financial transactions.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges R. Scot Buell as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence
data.description: In Coleville, California on July 23, 2026, R. Scot Buell was recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence in The Inner Circle for his significant contributions to Petroleum Engineering and Innovation. Buell holds a Bachelor of Science degree and is acknowledged for his outstanding achievements in the field.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Frances Iger Laterman as a Pinnacle Professional Member
data.description: A renowned figure in the classical contemporary art world, Frances Iger Laterman has been recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member for her significant contributions. This acknowledgment was highlighted in The Inner Circle, a prestigious platform. Frances Iger Laterman stands out for her pioneering work in the field, solidifying her reputation as a leading figure. The recognition underscores her impact and dedication to advancing classical contemporary art.

data.title: Korcomptenz Recognized as a Contender in Three Categories in the ISG Provider Lens® Microsoft AI and Cloud Ecosystem 2026 Study for the U.S.
data.description: Korcomptenz, a worldwide provider of digital transformation and technology services, was acknowledged for its excellence in various areas such as Microsoft business applications, Azure data and AI, and cloud modernization services. The announcement was made on July 23, 2026 in Parsippany, New Jersey. This recognition underscores the company's strengths in these key business sectors.

data.title: Right2Compute Coalition Launches to Secure Rights for Building AI Data Centers for Sovereign AI and Data Ownership
data.description: A new coalition called Right2Compute has been established to advocate for the rights of building artificial intelligence data centers that promote sovereign AI and data ownership. The coalition aims to ensure that organizations have the necessary resources to construct these data centers effectively. Through this initiative, the coalition seeks to safeguard the data rights of individuals and businesses, addressing concerns surrounding data sovereignty. This effort comes at a critical time as the demand for AI technologies continues to rise. The coalition's mission is to empower entities to take control of their data by fostering an environment conducive to sovereign AI and data ownership.

data.title: Oil Prices, Shipping Rates Surge As Rebels Open Second Front In Iran War
data.description: Oil futures contracts experienced a significant increase on Thursday in response to ongoing U.S. attacks for the 12th consecutive night and the announcement of Houthis potentially opening a new front in the conflict. This surge in oil prices and shipping rates comes as a result of escalating tensions in the region.

data.title: Federal Home Loan Bank of New York Announces Second Quarter 2026 Operating Highlights
data.description: On July 23, 2026, the Federal Home Loan Bank of New York (FHLBNY) disclosed its unaudited financial results for the quarter ending on June 30, 2026.

data.title: ZoomInfo’s Data Says Jersey Mike's Franchise System Is Consolidating Fast Ahead of Its IPO
data.description: A recent analysis conducted by ZoomInfo revealed significant changes in ownership within Jersey Mike's franchise system as the sandwich chain prepares for its upcoming initial public offering. The data from ZoomInfo's franchise dataset, which covers over 600,000 franchise locations and 3,000 brands in the United States, indicates a consolidation of ownership into the hands of large, multi-unit operators. This shift in ownership structure comes as Jersey Mike's gears up for its planned IPO. The analysis highlights the involvement of specific decision-makers within these franchise locations. The analysis is based on ZoomInfo's AI GTM Platform and its ability to identify operating owners and key individuals associated with each franchise location. This restructuring trend within Jersey Mike's franchise system is illustrative of broader changes occurring within the industry.

data.title: L3Harris Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Melbourne, Florida, L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) announced that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $1.25 per common share. This dividend will be payable on September 18, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 4, 2026. L3Harris Technologies is known as the Trusted Disruptor in defense technology, focusing on providing end-to-end technology solutions that cater to mission-critical needs across various domains including space, air, land, sea, and cyber.

data.title: Thyora Therapeutics Launches to Build a Next-Generation Platform for Covalent Drug Discovery
data.description: A biotechnology company named Thyora Therapeutics has recently been revealed to the public in Tampa, Florida. They are focusing on utilizing next-generation covalent chemistry to expedite clinical translation and develop treatments for severe medical conditions. The company is based on groundbreaking research disclosed in a publication by scientists at Moffitt Cancer Center, which has led to the creation of an integrated platform merging innovative covalent chemistry with AI-powered chemoproteomics. This platform aims to usher in a new era of therapeutic discovery.

data.title: There's A Hidden Gem In Eli Lilly's Weight-Loss News — And It Could Slam Compounders
data.description: On Thursday, Eli Lilly announced a delay in submitting its next-generation weight-loss drug, retatrutide, for FDA approval until the first quarter. This news could have significant implications for compounders.
